name: file-type-magic
description: Rust + WebAssembly file type checker for npm

scripts.build: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build:wasm:browser && npm run build:lib:browser && npm run build:wasm:node && npm run build:lib:node && npm run build:types
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean:artifacts && npm run build:wasm:browser:dev && npm run build:lib:browser && npm run build:wasm:node:dev && npm run build:lib:node && npm run build:types
scripts.build:wasm:browser: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg/browser --release
scripts.build:wasm:browser:dev: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg/browser --dev
scripts.build:wasm:node: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir dist/node-runtime --release && rm -f dist/node-runtime/.gitignore dist/node-runtime/README.md dist/node-runtime/package.json dist/node-runtime/file_type_magic.d.ts dist/node-runtime/file_type_magic_bg.wasm.d.ts
scripts.build:wasm:node:dev: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir dist/node-runtime --dev && rm -f dist/node-runtime/.gitignore dist/node-runtime/README.md dist/node-runtime/package.json dist/node-runtime/file_type_magic.d.ts dist/node-runtime/file_type_magic_bg.wasm.d.ts
scripts.check: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH cargo check
scripts.check:wasm: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown
scripts.test: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH cargo test
scripts.clean: PATH=$(dirname $(rustup which cargo --toolchain stable)):$PATH cargo clean && npm run clean:artifacts
